bird.name: 斑尾塍鹬
bird.summary: 斑尾塍鹬（学名：Limosa lapponica）又名斑尾鹬，为鹬科塍鹬属的鸟类。该物种的模式产地在瑞典。 斑尾鷸是一種大型且遷徙性強的涉禽，主要在沿海泥灘和河口覓食多毛蟲和貝類。牠具有鮮紅色的繁殖羽，長腿和向上翹的長喙。斑尾鷸在北極海岸和苔原繁殖，範圍從斯堪的納維亞到阿拉斯加…

relations.subject: 斑尾塍鹬
relations.evidence: menzbieri adult survival rates decreased between 2005 and 2012, probably because of the loss of intertidal staging areas in the Yellow Sea. The construction of seawalls and the reclamation of mudflats have led to a critical reduction in food supplies for migrating birds, particularly subspecies like L
relations.object_summary: 滨海滩涂被转化为建设或农业用地。

relations.subject: 斑尾塍鹬
relations.evidence: Notornis 67(4): 591-634 The decline in numbers of bar-tailed godwits is probably associated with habitat loss and degradation near Yellow Sea.Studds, C.E.; Kendall, B.E.; Murray, N
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
